handoff_rows.name: Rolls-Royce on data center backup-power equipment buildout
handoff_rows.thesis: Rolls-Royce appears to be a relevant beneficiary of data center backup-power equipment buildout, but the current evidence supports a beneficiary posture more cleanly than a strict bottleneck claim.
handoff_rows.value_capture_layer: Relevant supply-chain beneficiary without strict bottleneck proof
top_catalysts: order backlog conversion into reported revenue
top_invalidations: capacity expansion arrives without meaningful demand conversion
component or backlog signals fade in subsequent company reporting
downstream demand shifts to substitute suppliers or adjacent architectures
why_missed: beneficiary role is real but not yet framed as a strict chokepoint thesis
supplier relevance is easier to miss when coverage emphasizes end-market demand instead of component exposure

symbol_mapping_evidence.note: Official Rolls-Royce shareholder information page identifying Rolls-Royce Holdings plc (LSE: RR., ADR: RYCEY).

handoff_rows.name: Mitsubishi Electric on grid equipment and transformer buildout
handoff_rows.thesis: Mitsubishi Electric appears to sit in a constrained grid equipment and transformer buildout layer, with filing-backed component specificity, pressure signals, and capacity-expansion evidence that may still be underappreciated.
handoff_rows.value_capture_layer: Constrained upstream component supplier with system-level leverage
top_catalysts: order backlog conversion into reported revenue
top_invalidations: capacity expansion arrives without meaningful demand conversion
component or backlog signals fade in subsequent company reporting
downstream demand shifts to substitute suppliers or adjacent architectures
why_missed: market attention is concentrated on downstream power and AI beneficiaries
constrained component-layer suppliers are less obvious from headline buildout coverage
primary listing is outside the default U.S. ticker workflow

symbol_mapping_evidence.note: Official Mitsubishi Electric stock information page showing Tokyo Stock Exchange stock code 6503.
